question: List all name of collections that are related to collection named Best.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT C1.Collection_Name FROM Collections C1 JOIN Collection_Subset_Members C2 ON C1.Collection_ID = C2.Related_Collection_ID OR C1.Collection_ID = C2.Collection_ID WHERE C2.Collection_ID = (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best') UNION SELECT DISTINCT C2.Collection_Name FROM Collections C2 JOIN Collection_Subset_Members C1 ON C1.Collection_ID = C2.Collection_ID OR C1.Related_Collection_ID = C2.Collection_ID WHERE C1.Related_Collection_ID = (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best')

back_translation.intent: 查找与特定集合相关的其他集合名称
filters: Collection_ID IN (SELECT Related_Collection_ID FROM Collection_Subset_Members WHERE Collection_ID = (SELECT Collection_ID FROM Collections WHERE Collection_Name = 'Best'))

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求列出与'Best'集合相关的其他集合名称，但SQL反向翻译描述的过滤条件仅通过子查询获取Related_Collection_ID，未明确关联到Collections表获取名称，且未体现双向关联关系
